description: AI coding assistant for QuiltyCode with OpenRouter and Google Gemini API support, autonomous file writing, and autonomous command execution.
config.title: QuiltAI
config.maxContextLines: Maximum number of lines QuiltAI reads around the active selection.
config.includeCodeFenceLanguage: Include detected language identifiers in generated markdown code fences.
view.container.title: QuiltAI
view.sidebar.name: Assistant
config.openRouterApiKey: OpenRouter API key used for QuiltAI requests (for example sk-or-...). You can also set environment variable OPENROUTER_API_KEY.
config.openRouterBaseUrl: OpenRouter-compatible API base URL. Default: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
config.openRouterModel: Default model id for QuiltAI requests, for example google/gemini-2.5-pro or any dev/model identifier.
config.systemPrompt: System instruction prepended to every QuiltAI request.
config.allowAutoWrite: Allow QuiltAI to write files directly when the model returns quilt-edit blocks.
config.allowAutoCommandExecution: Allow QuiltAI to execute shell commands directly when the model returns quilt-cmd blocks.
config.provider: AI provider to use: openrouter or googleGemini.
config.googleGeminiApiKey: Google Gemini API key. You can also set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY.
config.googleGeminiBaseUrl: Google Gemini API base URL. Default: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta
config.googleGeminiModel: Default Gemini model id, for example gemini-2.5-pro.
config.enableSystemAccess: Enable local shell access for autonomous command execution in QuiltAI.
